steps.title: Identify the key location detail
steps.content: The passage states manul habitats are in “out-of-the-way parts” of Asia. This phrase indicates remoteness and isolation from populated areas.

steps.title: Apply the location signal to find the fit
steps.content: Distant from precisely captures why these cats are hard to study — their habitats are separated from human populations, making them difficult to access and research. The other three either contradict the “out-of-the-way” setup, are grammatically wrong, or make no sense. That matches choice C — C is correct.
